THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANIEL ANDRZEJEK, TRUSTEE OF THE ANDRZEJEK FAMILY TRUST UDT DATED JUNE 15, 2010 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLS, JONATHAN DICKSON, SHAHRIZAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT A ISSUE $6,500.00 RENT, $408.40 COSTS, $10,399.68 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $2,880.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,428.08, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
